description:
Japan can create storms in a (aircraft hanger sized) teacup. 
🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Please note, the featured interview is with Naoki Sakai, Associate Director - Research Division for Storm, Flood and Landslide Disasters, NIED

NIED is the National Research Institute for Earth Science and Disaster Resilience

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/why-japan-built-a-storm-simulator

00:00 - Storms
00:45 - Lucky Fred
01:37 - Japanese Houses
03:37 - Science in Tsukuba
05:26 - How it Works
06:47 - Groundbreaking Research 
09:16 - Fred Gets Wet
